elements.text: PETITION FOR LATE AND LIMITED FORMAL TESTACY and/or APPOINTMENT
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: (Form Alert:  You cannot use this form if the Decedent died prior to March 31, 2012)
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: The Petitioner(s) (hereafter "Petitioner"), an interested person, makes the following statements:
elements.name: StaticText6
field
elements.caption: A death certificate issued by a public officer is not in the possession of the court and does not accompany this Petition.

elements.name: field
elements.caption: A death certificate issued by a public officer is in the possession of the court or accompanies this Petition.

elements.text: The Petitioner has a property right in the estate of the Decedent that is the subject of this Petition or is a person having priority for appointment as Personal Representative or other fiduciary representing an interested person.  The Petitioner's interest is as follows:
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: (e.g., Personal Representative named in a will, surviving spouse, heir, devisee, etc. See G. L. c. 190B, §§ 1-201(24), 3-101).
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: No original proceeding relative to the estate has occurred within the three (3) year period after the Decedent's death and a formal testacy proceeding or appointment is necessary for the limited purpose of confirming title in the successors to estate assets listed in #8 below and paying expenses of administration, if any.  See G. L. c. 190B, § 3-108(4).
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: Venue for this proceeding is proper in this county because on the date of death, the Decedent:
elements.name: StaticText6
field
elements.caption: was not domiciled in Massachusetts, but had property located in this county at:

elements.text: The Petitioner shall give notice once by citation to the Division of Medical Assistance. To do so, the Petitioner shall send a copy of the citation when issued by the Court together with a copy of this Petition and death certificate by certified mail at least fourteen (14) days before the return day to the Division of Medical Assistance, Estate Recovery Unit, P.O. Box 15205, Worcester, MA  01615-0205. For specific details, see the citation's Order of Notice.
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: Failure to submit this information will result in a delay in processing your case.
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: There are additional heirs at law who are not known to the Petitioner.
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: After the exercise of reasonable diligence, the Petitioner is unaware of any unrevoked testamentary instrument relating to property in Massachusetts, or
elements.name: StaticText6
CheckBox2
elements.caption: see attached statement of why such an instrument is not being probated.

elements.text: The date of the Decedent's last will is
elements.name: StaticText6
CheckBox2
elements.caption: The dates of all codicils are

elements.name: field
elements.caption: The original will is lost, destroyed or otherwise unavailable and

elements.name: field
elements.caption: The original will is in the possession of the court or accompanies this Petition.

elements.text: The will and any codicils are referred to as the will.  The Petitioner, to the best of his or her knowledge, believes the will was validly executed.  After the exercise of reasonable diligence, the Petitioner is unaware of any instrument revoking the will and believes that the will is the Decedent's last will.
elements.name: StaticText6
CheckBox2
elements.caption: a statement of its contents are attached and incorporated herein.

elements.text: This Petition concerns the succession of the Decedent's interest in the following property:
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: The Petitioner requests that the following qualified person, who is 18 years of age or older, be appointed Personal Representative for the limited purpose of confirming title in the successors to the estate assets listed in #8 above and paying expenses of administration, if any:
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: All or some of the nominees have priority for appointment:
elements.name: StaticText6
field
elements.caption: by renunciation and/or nomination.  Persons with higher or equal rights to appointment are:

elements.name: field
elements.caption: by statute.  See G. L. c. 190B, § 3-203.

elements.text: The nominee(s) without priority for appointment are:
elements.name: StaticText6
field
elements.caption: The will waives sureties on the bond and no interested person has demanded that a bond with sureties be filed.

elements.name: field
elements.caption: A bond without sureties has been or will be filed and is permissible because:

elements.name: field
elements.caption: A bond with sureties in the penal sum amount of $                                                     has been or will be filed.

elements.text: and all waivers are filed with this Petition or are in the possession of the court.
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: and there is no necessity for supervised administration because:
elements.name: StaticText6
CheckBox1
elements.caption: The will directs supervised administration, but circumstances have changed since the execution of the will

elements.name: CheckBox1
elements.caption: The will directs unsupervised administration or is silent on the issue.

elements.name: CheckBox1
elements.caption: The Decedent died intestate (without a will).

elements.name: CheckBox1
elements.caption: The will directs unsupervised administration, but it is necessary for protection of persons interested in the estate

elements.name: CheckBox1
elements.caption: No will directs supervised administration but it is necessary under the circumstances, specifically:

elements.text: Wherefore, the Petitioner requests that the court:
elements.name: StaticText6
CheckBox1
elements.caption: Admit the Decedent's will to formal probate and determine both the heirs and devisees.

elements.name: CheckBox1
elements.caption: Determine that the Decedent died without a will and determine the heirs.

elements.name: CheckBox1
elements.caption: Appoint the nominee(s) as Personal Representative of the estate in a(n)

elements.text: Personal Representative to confirming title in the successors to the estate assets identified herein and paying expenses of administration, if any.
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: sureties on the bond and that Letters be issued that limit the authority of the
elements.name: StaticText6
CheckBox1
elements.caption: Appoint a Special Personal Representative pending the appointment of the nominated Personal Representative.

elements.text: SIGNED UNDER THE PENALTIES OF PERJURY
elements.name: StaticText6

elements.text: I certify under the penalties of perjury that the foregoing statements are true to the best of my knowledge and belief.
elements.name: StaticText6
